summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CreaoBrowser - all core functionality working correctly. The main fix (search results staying in same tab instead of opening new browser tabs) is working perfectly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: CORS policy blocking all SearXNG endpoints

passed_tests: Search from new tab page search box - results display in same tab
Search from address bar - results display in same tab
Quick links click (Google, YouTube, GitHub etc) - load in same tab
Bookmarks bar click - load in same tab
Tab management - new tab button, close tab, switch tabs all working
Navigation buttons - back, forward, refresh, home all working
Search results display in iframe within same tab (no new browser tabs)
postMessage communication between iframe and parent working
Loading indicators and progress bars working
DuckDuckGo fallback when SearXNG APIs fail
